zh.lifeSummary: Richard Emildon是William Emildon和De Mildon的兒子，於1275年出生在英國諾圖波藍德潔斯蒙德。他於1299年與Christina De Mowbray在英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1333年7月19日在英國諾圖波藍德貝維其可-朋-特維德享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Emildon是William Emildon和De Mildon的儿子，于1275年出生在英国諾圖波藍德潔斯蒙德。他于1299年与Christina De Mowbray在英国諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1333年7月19日在英国諾圖波藍德貝維其可-朋-特維德享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Emildon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon): habitational name from Mildon in Oakford (Devon), which was named in Old English with middel ‘middle’ + dūn ‘hill’. Alternatively, it may be from Meldon in Okehampton, which is probably named with Old English mǣle ‘multi-colored, variegated’ + dūn ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: Richard Emildon was born in 1275, in Jesmond, Northumberland, England as the son of William Emildon and De Mildon. He married Christina De Mowbray in 1299, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 19 July 1333, in Berwick-upon-Tweed, Northumberland, England, at the age of 58.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Emildon(은)는 1275년 영국 노르스벌랜드 제스몽에서 William Emildon(와)과 De Mildon의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1299년 영국 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 Christina De Mowbray(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1333년 7월 19일 영국 노르스벌랜드 버윅-업-트위드에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Christina De Mowbray em 1299, em Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Richard Emildon родился в 1275 г. в местности джесмонд, нортумбирланд, Англия. Его родителей звали William Emildon и De Mildon. Он женился на женщине по имени Christina De Mowbray в 1299 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 19 июля 1333 г. в местности бирвикк-упон-твид, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 58 лет.
